case_title: FERRARI, NOREEN L. VS MCNABB, JAMES C/O MCNABB, KAY

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MCNABB, JAMES C/O MCNABB, KAY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $265.01 FILED BY FERRARI, NOREEN L. AS TO DEFENDANT MCNABB, JAMES C/O MCNABB, KAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-11-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FERRARI, NOREEN L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCNABB, JAMES C/O MCNABB, KAY $265.01 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $280.01 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO JAMES MCNABB, NOT SERVED 20 DAYS PRIOR HRG. ON SUBSERVICE.
